message:
feat: add configurable encoding thresholds for hash, set, and zset types

- Add hash_max_listpack_entries/value, set_max_intset_entries,
  set_max_listpack_entries, zset_max_listpack_entries/value fields to
  Store with Redis-compatible defaults (128/64/512/128/128/64)
- Replace hardcoded constants in OBJECT ENCODING logic with live Store
  fields so CONFIG SET changes take immediate effect
- Wire CONFIG GET/SET for all six listpack/intset parameters plus four
  ziplist aliases (hash-max-ziplist-*, zset-max-ziplist-*) that map to
  their listpack equivalents
- Implement manual Default for Store to initialize encoding thresholds
- Add 20 conformance test fixtures covering encoding transitions when
  thresholds are lowered and ziplist-to-listpack alias round-tripping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
